title: runWithOwner
description: Runs a function under a specific reactive owner. Required for creating effects in async callbacks.
signature: runWithOwner<T>(owner: Owner | null, fn: () => T): T | undefined
param_owner_desc: The owner scope to run under. Get this from getOwner(). Accepts null.
param_fn_desc: Function to run. Any effects/cleanups created inside are owned by owner.
info_async_owner: After await or inside callbacks, the reactive owner is lost. Capture it synchronously with getOwner() and restore it with runWithOwner().
